title: Simple BBQ
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/6taXx5C.png)

Relaxing and Enjoyable Barbecue.

## 🍖 Introduction **Simple BBQ** is an entry for [TeaCon 2022](https://www.teacon.cn/2022) modding competition. It is a very simple mod (just like its name) that adds skewering, grilling, and seasoning features to give you the fun of BBQ in Minecraft. ## 🍢 Skewer Everything Up Place the food on the **Skewering Table** and turn the food into skewers with sticks or bamboo. ![Skewering Table](https://i.imgur.com/YFuybDf.png) ## 🔥 Grill on the Campfire Set the **Grill** on the **Campfire**, place the prepared skewers on the Grill and wait patiently for a few moments to get the delicious skewers. ![Grill](https://i.imgur.com/8OhfYUL.png) ## 🧂 Get More Flavor Skewers without flavor are boring. Do you want a spicy flavor? Then have some **Chili Powder**. Do you prefer sweet? How about a little **Honey**? The unique flavor of **Cumin** and the salty flavor of **Salt and Pepper** are both what I want. Seasoning can be added during the skewers grilling, and eating seasoned skewers will also have **special effects**. ![Seasoning](https://i.imgur.com/uuXbd1v.png) ## 👨‍🍳 Professional Barbecue Chef You can find some unique **BBQ Camps** in the village, where you can find a professional barbecue chef called **Skewerman**. He can not only help you skewer, but also sell you some of his treasured **seasonings**. Why not make a deal with him? ![Skewerman](https://i.imgur.com/OS3o7Xj.png) ## ⚙️ Customization As a modpack maker, you can add **Skewering Recipes**, **Grilling Recipes**, and **Seasoning Recipes** easily via datapack. In the future, you can also customize **Seasoning Effects** with datapack. ## 🪲 Bugs & Suggestions If you find any bugs or have some suggestions, feel free to submit an issue ticket on the issue tracker. Even though we are not native English speakers, we will still do our best to help you.
